Created attachment 228874
Update to 1.002

Changes for version 1.002

-Fix [rt.cpan.org #90922] reported by Upasana Shukla and patched by Zoffix Znet. The use of Class::MOP::load_class() is deprecated. Use Class::Load::load_class() instead.
